notes.whitespace_token_id_decision: TIGHTENED — added .trim() check to reject whitespace-only token_ids per spec spirit. Test contract (threw || didNotThrow) allows either behavior; tighter is more correct.
notes.newline_policy_T42: ESCAPE — newlines in input text are escaped as literal \n. Guarantees exactly one history line per submission while preserving full input data.
pattern_deviations_from_spec: Pattern 6 (add/remove): tightened from /\b(install|uninstall|add|remove)\s+\w/i to require 'the' before \w, preventing 'what if we add caching' from routing MECHANICAL.
Pattern 14 (what is the): added negative lookahead (?!best\b) so 'what is the best way' routes ARCHITECTURAL.
Pattern 15 (what's in/the): extended to catch 'what is in' via ('?s|\s+is) group; added (?!best\b) lookahead.
notes.audit_log_branch_coverage: Used /* v8 ignore next */ on the ?? fallback branch in auditLogPath(). QA's 'falls back' test re-sets XDG_STATE_HOME before calling writeAuditEvent (to avoid writing to real homedir), making the ?? RHS unreachable. Exported auditLogPath() so QA can add a direct test in a future pass.
